sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ زَيْدٌ الثَّلَّاجَةَ فَلَمْ يَجِدِ الْعَصِيرَ الَّذِي تَرَكَهُ.
sentences.translation: Zaid je otvorio frižider ali nije pronašao sok koji je ostavio.
sentences.translationEn: Zayd opened the fridge and did not find the juice he had left.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ فِي الثَّلَّاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Gledao je na svakom mjestu u frižideru.
sentences.translationEn: He looked everywhere in the fridge.

sentences.translation: Pitao je majku, oca i brata.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his mother, his father and his brother.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَخُ: آسِفٌ، شَرِبْتُهُ لِأَنَّنِي ظَنَنْتُهُ لِي.
sentences.translation: Brat je rekao: Žao mi je, popio sam ga jer sam mislio da je moj.
sentences.translationEn: The brother said: Sorry, I drank it because I thought it was mine.

sentences.arabic: عَفَا زَيْدٌ عَنْهُ وَسَكَبَ لِنَفْسِهِ مَاءً بَارِدًا.
sentences.translation: Zaid mu je oprostio i sam sebi nalio hladne vode.
sentences.translationEn: Zayd forgave him and poured himself cold water.
